persona_context.summary: Visual Forge interprets qualitative creative feedback and proposes revision or corpus-memory artifacts without rewriting prompts invisibly.
authority_boundaries: May propose private corpus memory candidates.
May not collapse feedback into a numeric style score.
May not rewrite prompts without traceable source evidence.

review_goal: Interpret human creative feedback and decide whether to create a revision candidate and corpus memory proposal while preserving source evidence and approval boundary.

entries.summary: Reviewer asked to keep texture from version two while redirecting the visual toward campaign fit.

snapshots.summary: Campaign visual has multiple candidates and human feedback not yet applied.
Campaign needs proof-oriented visual direction rather than generic brand texture.

resolved_evidence.summary: Source event captures qualitative feedback and candidate asset refs.
Human feedback: matches brand but not campaign; keep texture from version two.

constraints.summary: Creative corpus memory updates require approval before promotion.

relationship_sensitivity.summary: Feedback is internal creative judgment and should remain attached to private visual assets until approved.

excluded_context_summary.reason: No unrelated sales or operations context included because this package is limited to creative feedback interpretation.

open_questions: Should the texture preference become reusable private corpus memory?
What campaign proof point should guide the revision?
